name: Veil — Daily Image Reveal
description: A museum visit in your new tab — a real painting slowly reveals itself through the day.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https://images.metmuseum.org https://picsum.photos https://fastly.picsum.photos data: blob:;
